chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3847 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15703 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 7. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15704 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For orders on Misc. No.15705 of 2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Father of petitioner is present in person. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. Petitioner seeks time to file certain documents. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
